author: Zinvernix
description: AI-powered vault audit: find orphan notes, cluster topics, get tag and link suggestions, batch-process notes with filters. Works with OpenRouter, OpenAI, Groq or locally via Ollama. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.name: Vault Audit AI

name: Vault Audit AI

releases.author: zinverno
releases.description:
## Vault Audit AI 1.1.5

This release renames the plugin to **Vault Audit AI** and adds full English localization.

### New
- **English localization** with a language switcher (Auto / English / Русский) in settings. Auto-detects your Obsidian language. The entire UI, notices, reports — and the AI prompts themselves — switch language, so the assistant replies in your chosen language.
- **Live free-models list for OpenRouter** — a new button in settings fetches the currently available free models (with context sizes) directly from OpenRouter, so you never end up selecting a model that has been removed.

### Changed
- Renamed to **Vault Audit AI** with a clearer focus: vault audit and maintenance first. Same plugin, same data — only the name and positioning changed.
- Command names no longer repeat the plugin name.

### Code quality (community review)
- `window.setTimeout` / `window.clearTimeout` for popout-window compatibility
- Respects a custom config directory (`Vault#configDir`) instead of a hardcoded `.obsidian`
- Typed API responses and editor internals — removed remaining `any` casts
- Async event handlers properly wrapped (no floating promises)
- Replaced all inline styles with CSS classes; removed `innerHTML` usage
- CSS: dropped `!important` overrides in favor of specific selectors; fixed scrollbar lint warnings

**Note:** command names in the palette update after reloading the plugin (Obsidian sets them once at registration). Everything else switches language instantly.

releases.author: zinverno
releases.description:
## What's new

- **Live free models list for OpenRouter** — new button in settings fetches the current list of free models (with context sizes) directly from OpenRouter, so you never end up with a removed model
- Command names no longer duplicate the plugin name

## Code quality (community catalog review)

- `window.setTimeout` / `window.clearTimeout` for popout window compatibility
- Respect custom config directory (`Vault#configDir`) instead of hardcoded `.obsidian`
- Typed OpenRouter API responses and editor internals — removed remaining `any` casts
- Async event handlers properly wrapped (no floating promises)
- CSS: dropped `!important` overrides in favor of specific selectors, fixed scrollbar lint warnings
